{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's Remnant arm
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is made of true [[Dreadgod]] flesh and can warp spiritual senses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
